docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

COURT TRIAL HELD ON SEP-12-2005 IN DEPT. 502 - WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED, DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED - THE COURT FOUND JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND ORDERED IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES OF 44 MCALLISTER STREET, #614, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA TO THE PLAINTIFF AND FURTHER ORDERED DEFENDANT DAMINI SHARMA AKA DAIMINI PASBOLA TO PAY PLAINTIFF $300 IN ATTORNEY FEES AND THAT THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS FORFEITED.(502 JUDGE C. MITCHELL; CLERK: LINDA ESPY; REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO, CSR #12353)
